title: Chronicle S7a: evolve-historian batch-boundary agent (report-only shadow) + delete vestigial evolve-operator
summary: THE ROLE that reads history loop results (user-chosen hybrid: LLM judgment ONCE per batch, not per cycle). New agents/evolve-historian.md + .evolve/profiles/historian.json (memo-profile skeleton: read-mostly; Write limited to its own workspace .evolve/runs/historian-<runid>/{historian-report.md,historian-actions.json}; sandbox write_subpaths accordingly; max_turns ~15; tier balanced). DELETE agents/evolve-operator.md in this slice (dispatch:none vestigial, references retired .evolve/workspace/ layout; its duties were long since scattered to phaseobserver/advisor/ledger - YAGNI precedent deletes dead definitions). Dispatch: cmd_loop dispatches ONCE after the batch/wave loop ends (near finalizeCompletedCycle), via the in-process subagent engine (the runSubagentRun path, cmd_subagent.go:342) - NOT a phase spec (.evolve/phases/ runs inside the cycle DAG; wrong boundary). Inputs: recent-outcomes digest + index summary + batch dossiers. Output: historian-report.md (batch health narrative: recurrence themes, stalled goals, gate-flip readiness) + historian-actions.json {preventive_actions:[{id,title,weight_hint,evidence}]} - REPORT-ONLY in this slice (filing is S7b). Policy: chronicle.historian off|on, compiled default OFF.
acceptance: RED: TestRunLoop_DispatchesHistorianOncePerBatch (fake-runner seam; exactly once, after last cycle)
agents/evolve-operator.md deleted; installer agentPersonas list updated; no dangling references (grep pin)
